case_title: U-SAVE PLUMBING AND HARDWARE VS CHIU JOHNSON

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,320.33 FILED BY U-SAVE PLUMBING AND HARDWARE AS TO DEFENDANT CHIU JOHNSON ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-27-1991 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 04
